message:
feat(health): add checks_from_policy_dashboard() to bridge policy metrics into runtime health

Generates RuntimeHealthCheck instances from PolicyMetricsDashboard indicators,
mapping each (denial rate, quarantine density, compliance violations, audit
chain integrity, kill switch) to appropriate CheckStatus/HealthTier/FailureClass
with actionable remediation hints. These checks can be registered in the
HealthCheckRegistry for unified `ft doctor` reporting.

5 unit tests covering healthy dashboard, kill-switch critical, high-denial
warning, invalid-chain critical, and registry integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
